---
title: "Tree Database"
---

Enter a tree number to view detailed information about that specific tree in our collection.

::: {style="max-width: 400px; margin: 2rem 0;"}
<div style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
<label for="treeNumber" style="display: block; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; font-weight: bold;">Tree Number:</label>
<input type="text" id="treeNumber" inputmode="numeric" pattern="[0-9]*" min="1" required style="width: 100%; padding: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 1rem;">
</div>
<button type="button" onclick="(function(){const n=document.getElementById('treeNumber').value.replace(/^0+/,''); if(n) window.location.href = n + '.html';})()" style="background-color: #007bff; color: white; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 1rem;">
View Tree
</button>
:::

---

*The tree database contains detailed information about individual trees in the Nature Discovery Garden (South Kensington), Evolution Garden (South Kensington) and Tring including species identification, planting history, and measurement data.*

<div class="tree-list">
{{< include _tree-list.md >}}
</div>
